title: Optimized & Stuff
description: Optimized & Stuff is a 1.21.1 Fabric pack designed for those who want it all. Powered by Sodium and C2ME for ultimate performance, and enriched with Hold My Items and 3D models for a breathtaking look. No lag, just pure Minecraft beauty.
body:
🚀 Optimized & Stuff (v1.21.11)
Welcome to Optimized & Stuff, the ultimate Minecraft experience that bridges the gap between extreme performance and breathtaking visuals. This pack is meticulously crafted to ensure that even with high-end shaders and 3D textures, your game runs smoother than ever.

🛠️ The Engine: Performance & Core
These mods work behind the scenes to maximize your FPS and minimize stuttering.

🚀 Sodium & Sodium Extra: The gold standard for rendering engine replacement.

🧠 Lithium & C2ME: Optimizes game logic and provides multi-threaded world generation.

💾 FerriteCore: Significantly reduces memory (RAM) usage.

⚡ ImmediatelyFast: Optimizes immediate mode rendering for menus and entities.

🌐 Bobby: Allows for a much higher render distance than the server limit by caching chunks.

📦 Fabric API & Language Kotlin: The essential foundations for all modern mods.

🎨 The Canvas: Visuals & Graphics
Making Minecraft look modern, atmospheric, and dynamic.

✨ Iris Shaders: Support for the included "Mellow" and "Complementary Reimagined" shaders.

💡 LambDynamicLights: Items like torches illuminate your surroundings while held.

🌊 Visuality & Subtle Effects: Adds realistic particles, crystal-clear water drops, and environmental fluff.

💥 Explosive Enhancement: Replaces standard explosions with high-quality, physics-based visuals.

🌿 Optileaves: Makes trees look bushy and full without the performance hit of standard "fancy" leaves.

🎭 EMF & ETF: Brings OptiFine-standard entity models and textures to Fabric for maximum compatibility.

🕺 The Soul: Animations & Immersion
Bringing the world to life with fluid movements and better feedback.

🎬 Fresh Animations & Extension: Gives mobs life-like movements and expressions.

🏃 Not Enough Animations: Adds third-person animations for eating, drinking, and rowing.

🎒 Hold My Items: Players visibly hold items in their hands in a realistic way.

🔍 Zoomify: A highly customizable zoom tool for scouting the horizon.

🖥️ The Cockpit: UI & Utility
Clean menus and essential info at your fingertips.

🍎 AppleSkin: Detailed food values and saturation visualized on your HUD.

🖱️ Cursors Extended: Customizes your in-game mouse for a sleeker feel.

📂 Mod Menu & YetAnotherConfigLib: Easily manage and configure every mod in this list.

🖼️ Resourcify & Puzzle: In-game resource pack browsing and enhanced GUI fixes.

📦 The Texture Vault: Aesthetics
A carefully curated selection of resource packs included by default.

🔹 Style & Consistency
Bare Bones: Provides that clean, "official trailer" look.

Icons: Replaces menu text with intuitive, beautiful icons.

Story Mode Clouds: Adds those iconic, blocky cinematic clouds.

🔹 3D Models & Depth
Actually 3D Stuff & Weskerson's 3D Items: Transforms flat sprites into high-quality 3D models.

Classic Tools & Fresh Seeds: Adds depth and detail to the items you use most.

🔹 Details & HUD
Enchantment Outlines: Makes enchanted items stand out in your inventory.

Fresh Foods & HMI: Visual overhauls for your consumables and interface.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

And also, a polished visual experience with curated packs:

Fresh Animations & Player Add-on: Brings life-like movement to every mob and player. 🕺

Actually 3D Stuff: Transforms flat items into high-quality 3D models for extra depth. 📦

HMI Hand Poses & Hold My Items: Realistic hand positions for a truly immersive feel. 🖐️

Fresh Food, Flowers & Seeds: Vibrant and detailed nature for a better-looking world. 🍎🌸

Enchantment Outlines & Icons: Cleaner UI and glowing gear for easy inventory management. ✨

Cursors Extended: A sleek, modern cursor for the perfect final touch. 🖱️

⚠️ Note: Some of these resource packs are optional. You can enable or disable them in the settings to perfectly match your personal preference! ⚙️
